title: Activity Log and Scanner Fixes
summary: Release 0.1.20 includes 2 new features, 2 bug fixes.

sections.label: New Features
items: Calendar date+time picker on Activity Log filters for precise event range selection
Replace default Vite favicon with Investron logo and fix browser tab title

sections.label: Bug Fixes
items: Fix TypeScript errors in DatePicker onChange handlers
Improve scanner resilience and fix screener rank/limit calculation bugs
